request_debug.prompt_preview:
You are the final consolidation step in a startup slopmortem pipeline. Earlier stages compared a fresh pitch against several historical startup failures and produced per-failure lessons. Your job: pick and rank the lessons that actually apply to THIS pitch, dedup paraphrases, and explain why each applies.

Rules:
- Only consolidate lessons from the input list. Do NOT invent new risks. If a theme spans multiple lessons, write one canonical summary covering them.
- Drop lessons that do not apply t

response.text: {"top_risks":[{"summary":"Build a defensible moat; hyperscalers are expanding into ephemeral preview environments and can erase convenience advantages.","applies_because":"The pitch targets ephemeral preview environments across cloud providers — exactly the territory AWS, Vercel, and Render are expanding into, mirroring how AWS/GCP erased Parse's ease-of-use advantage.","raised_by":["parse::devtools"],"severity":"high"},{"summary":"Define and gate the paid hosted control-plane tier before launch to prevent the free CLI from becoming the entire product in users' minds.","applies_because":"The pitch ships a free CLI plus a hosted control plane — the exact split that caused RethinkDB's monetization failure when the open product overshadowed the paid tier.","raised_by":["rethinkdb::devtools"],"severity":"high"},{"summary":"Validate enterprise willingness-to-pay before scaling CLI distribution so community growth funds rather than replaces revenue.","applies_because":"The pitch leads with a developer-focused CLI, risking over-indexing on developer adoption metrics instead of paying B2B customers — the same trap RethinkDB fell into.","raised_by":["rethinkdb::devtools"],"severity":"high"},{"summary":"Design the platform for portability and self-hosting from day one to avoid catastrophic switching-cost lock-in.","applies_because":"The pitch manages environments across cloud providers; if egress or lock-in becomes painful, customers will churn — a lesson directly drawn from Parse's belated open-source release failing to save the business.","raised_by":["parse::devtools"],"severity":"medium"},{"summary":"Establish a clear CLI-to-control-plane conversion funnel with measurable activation milestones before scaling distribution.","applies_because":"The pitch's two-product structure (CLI + hosted control plane) requires a defined upgrade path; RethinkDB never established this and lost the monetization window.","raised_by":["rethinkdb::devtools"],"severity":"medium"},{"summary":"Track paying customers and expansion revenue from day one — not GitHub stars or CLI downloads.","applies_because":"The pitch is developer-focused and ships a CLI, creating a natural pull toward vanity metrics like downloads, the exact proxy RethinkDB mistook for business health.","raised_by":["rethinkdb::devtools"],"severity":"medium"},{"summary":"Monitor hyperscaler roadmaps continuously and revalidate differentiation as AWS, Vercel, and Render expand into this space.","applies_because":"The pitch operates across multiple cloud providers in the ephemeral environment category where hyperscalers are actively building native equivalents.","raised_by":["parse::devtools"],"severity":"medium"},{"summary":"Establish direct recurring revenue relationships early so the business is not dependent on any single strategic backer's patience.","applies_because":"A B2B SaaS control plane relying on enterprise contracts or platform partnerships risks the same strategic-patience dependency that ultimately ended Parse.","raised_by":["parse::devtools","rethinkdb::devtools"],"severity":"medium"},{"summary":"Retain founding engineering team by building commercial traction early to reduce acqui-hire risk if growth stalls.","applies_because":"Developer tooling startups with strong CLI traction but weak revenue are prime acqui-hire targets, a risk flagged for both Parse and RethinkDB when perceived as stalled.","raised_by":["parse::devtools","rethinkdb::devtools"],"severity":"low"}],"injection_detected":false}
